name: Spinach and Artichoke
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cook the spinach according to package directions and drain well.
3. Stir in the cheese, butter, water chestnuts, salt, and pepper.
4. Line a glass pie plate (8-10 inches) or baking dish with the diced artichoke hearts.
5. Pour the spinach mixture over the artichokes.
6. Top with bread crumbs.
7. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
